outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated near-term volatility due to negative 0DTE GEX; spot caught between 0DTE Max Pain (581) and Weekly Gamma Flip (583). Directional breakout likely.
outlook.summary: Spot 582.06 is trapped in a tight gamma battlefield between 0DTE Max Pain (581) and Weekly Gamma Flip (583). Massive 600 RESONANCE level caps upside across all expirations. 0DTE shows extreme bullish PCR (0.48) while Weekly is extremely bearish (3.77) - divergence signals potential mean reversion. Negative 0DTE GEX amplifies volatility. Monthly skew is bullish (reverse smirk), suggesting longer-term optimism. Key decision point at 583.

levels.motivazione: Triple-expiry resonance: 0DTE (9763 OI), WEEKLY (1523 OI), MONTHLY (23934 CALL + 40303 PUT OI). Absolute ceiling with massive open interest across all timeframes. Dealers heavily short calls - will defend aggressively.
levels.sintesiOperativa: RESISTANCE: Ultimate ceiling - scale out longs

levels.motivazione: Weekly gamma flip exactly at current spot zone. Critical decision point where dealer hedging shifts from stabilizing to accelerating. Break above targets 593 Max Pain.
levels.sintesiOperativa: PIVOT: Breakout trigger - watch for direction

levels.motivazione: 0DTE Max Pain at 581.0, only 0.18% from spot. Strong magnetic attraction for end-of-day pin. 3328 CALL OI + high volume (12704) creates dealer incentive to contain price here.
levels.sintesiOperativa: MAGNET: Pin risk active - expect consolidation

levels.motivazione: Dual-expiry PUT confluence: WEEKLY (5874 OI) + MONTHLY (19055 OI). Just above spot acting as immediate resistance. High volume in WEEKLY (4804) confirms active defense.
Monthly PUT wall with 28892 OI. First major support below spot. Dealers long puts here will buy futures to hedge, providing structural support.
Massive MONTHLY PUT wall with 42818 OI - largest single-strike OI in dataset. Ultimate structural support. Dealer hedging creates strong buying pressure on approach.
0DTE CALL with 4822 OI but explosive volume (29308). Volume/OI ratio of 6.07 signals unusual institutional activity. Immediate resistance above spot.
Primary 0DTE PUT support with 7288 OI. Negative GEX environment means dealer short gamma will accelerate selling if breached. Critical downside target.
levels.sintesiOperativa: SUPPORT: Day trader floor - stop loss zone
